title: antennaria undulata
intro: Antennaria undulata, also known as wavy leafed pussytoes, is a low-growing perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Antennaria undulata is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its sesquiterpene lactones, which have been shown to have antimicrobial and antioxidant effects, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Antennaria undulata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat skin conditions, respiratory issues, and digestive problems.
